% !TEX root = ../thesis.tex
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% template/preamble.tex
%% Loaded BEFORE \documentclass — declares booleans, reads settings.tex,
%% then calls \documentclass and configures all packages and styles.
%% Do not edit unless you know what you are doing. Use settings.tex instead.
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

\RequirePackage{fix-cm,cmap}
\RequirePackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\RequirePackage[T1]{fontenc}
\RequirePackage{etoolbox}

%% Boolean declarations (values set in settings.tex)
\newbool{twoside}
\newbool{markLinks}
\newbool{color}
\newbool{acknowledgements}
\newbool{listoffigures}
\newbool{listoflistings}
\newbool{listoftables}
\newbool{listofacronyms}
\newbool{glossary}
\newbool{mergeListings}

\input{settings}

\ifbool{twoside}{\def\onetwoside{twoside}}{\def\onetwoside{oneside}}

\documentclass[
  fontsize=11pt,
  paper=a4,
  numbers=noenddot,
  \onetwoside,
  open=right,
  cleardoublepage=plain,
  parskip=half+,
  BCOR=1cm,
]{scrreprt}

%% TOC depth
\setcounter{tocdepth}{3}
\setcounter{secnumdepth}{3}

%% Language
\usepackage[english]{babel}
\usepackage{lmodern}

%% Bibliography
\usepackage[
  style=numeric,
  giveninits=false,
  natbib=true,
  backend=biber,
  maxbibnames=99,
  defernumbers=true,
  language=autobib,
  date=long,
]{biblatex}
\setcounter{biburlnumpenalty}{9000}
\setcounter{biburllcpenalty}{9000}
\setcounter{biburlucpenalty}{9000}
\addbibresource{literature/literature.bib}

%% Graphics + PDF includes (mandatory for declaration PDF)
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{pdfpages}

%% Math
\usepackage{amsmath, amssymb, amsfonts}

%% Tables
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{multirow}

%% TikZ (used for title page accent)
\usepackage{tikz}

%% Symbols / icons
\usepackage{marvosym}
\usepackage{fontawesome5}

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% Colors — full BUW palette + grayscale fallback
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
\usepackage[table,showerrors]{xcolor}

\definecolor{Buw}            {cmyk}{0.55, 0.00, 1.00, 0.00} % Pantone 376
\definecolor{BuwEtikett}     {cmyk}{0.55, 0.00, 1.00, 0.10}
\definecolor{BuwFak01}       {cmyk}{0.08, 1.00, 0.65, 0.34} % Pantone 201
\definecolor{BuwFak02}       {cmyk}{1.00, 0.03, 0.34, 0.12} % Pantone 321
\definecolor{BuwFak03}       {cmyk}{1.00, 0.57, 0.12, 0.70} % Pantone 540
\definecolor{BuwFak04_oben}  {cmyk}{0.70, 0.30, 0.00, 0.12} % Pantone 646
\definecolor{BuwFak04_unten} {cmyk}{1.00, 0.61, 0.04, 0.26} % Pantone 301
\definecolor{BuwFak05}       {cmyk}{0.23, 0.17, 0.13, 0.46} % Pantone Cool Gray 8
\definecolor{BuwFak06_oben}  {cmyk}{0.37, 1.00, 0.00, 0.26} % Pantone 2425
\definecolor{BuwFak06_unten} {cmyk}{0.37, 1.00, 0.00, 0.47}
\definecolor{BuwFak07}       {cmyk}{1.00, 0.00, 0.55, 0.40} % Pantone 562
\definecolor{BuwFak08}       {cmyk}{0.00, 0.00, 0.00, 0.00}
\definecolor{BuwFak09}       {cmyk}{0.00, 0.30, 0.85, 0.00} % Pantone 1235
\definecolor{pureK}          {cmyk}{0.00, 0.00, 0.00, 1.00}
\definecolor{AccentStrong}   {cmyk}{0.000, 0.420, 0.800, 0.100}
\definecolor{AccentWeak}     {cmyk}{0.295, 0.142, 0.000, 0.310}

\ifbool{color}{
  \colorlet{primaryTop}     {Buw}
  \colorlet{primaryMiddle}  {Buw}
  \colorlet{primaryBottom}  {Buw}
  \colorlet{secondaryTop}   {BuwFak06_oben}
  \colorlet{secondaryMiddle}{BuwFak06_oben!50!BuwFak06_unten}
  \colorlet{secondaryBottom}{BuwFak06_unten}
  \colorlet{tertiaryTop}    {black!50}
  \colorlet{tertiaryMiddle} {black!50}
  \colorlet{tertiaryBottom} {black!50}
  \colorlet{textBlack}      {black}
}{
  % Grayscale: avoid pure black for the thick head/foot rules — use a softer gray
  \colorlet{primaryTop}     {pureK!45}
  \colorlet{primaryMiddle}  {pureK!45}
  \colorlet{primaryBottom}  {pureK!45}
  \colorlet{secondaryTop}   {pureK!60}
  \colorlet{secondaryMiddle}{pureK!60}
  \colorlet{secondaryBottom}{pureK!60}
  \colorlet{tertiaryTop}    {pureK!40}
  \colorlet{tertiaryMiddle} {pureK!40}
  \colorlet{tertiaryBottom} {pureK!40}
  \colorlet{textBlack}      {pureK}
}
\colorlet{primary}    {primaryMiddle}
\colorlet{secondary}  {secondaryMiddle}
\colorlet{tertiary}   {tertiaryMiddle}

\colorlet{pagenumber}  {tertiaryBottom!50!textBlack}
\colorlet{headrule}    {primaryTop}
\colorlet{footrule}    {primaryBottom}
\colorlet{footnoteRule}{secondary}

%% Logo selection (color vs. grayscale)
\newcommand{\buwlogopdf}{images/BUW_Logo_cmykblack.pdf}
\ifbool{color}{\renewcommand{\buwlogopdf}{images/BUW_Logo_richblack.pdf}}{}

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% Code listings — minted (RUB default)
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
\usepackage[newfloat]{minted}
\SetupFloatingEnvironment{listing}{name=Listing}
\setminted{
  frame=single,
  fontsize=\footnotesize,
  linenos=true,
  numbersep=5pt,
  breaklines=true,
  breakautoindent=true,
  breakbefore=.,
  breakafter=-,
  escapeinside=~~
}
\BeforeBeginEnvironment{minted}{\smallskip}
\AfterEndEnvironment{minted}{\smallskip}
\setmintedinline{
  fontsize=\small,
  escapeinside=~~,
  breakbefore=.,
  breakafter=-:/\,
}
\newmintinline[code]{text}{}
\newmintinline[js]{javascript}{}
\newmintinline[html]{html}{}
\newmintinline[json]{json}{}

%% Quotes (loaded after minted/fvextra to avoid lineno warning)
\usepackage[babel,english=american]{csquotes}

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% Glossaries (RUB approach — clickable acronyms, no \glsdisablehyper)
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
\usepackage[acronym]{glossaries}
\makeglossaries
\loadglsentries{glossary/glossary}

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% Page geometry
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
\areaset[1cm]{15cm}{23cm}
\setlength{\headheight}{1.4cm}
\setlength{\footskip}{1.4cm}

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% Headers / Footers — KOMA scrlayer-scrpage with BUW logo + colored rules
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
\usepackage[automark,headsepline=1.5mm,footsepline=1.5mm]{scrlayer-scrpage}

\setkomafont{headsepline}{\color{headrule}}
\setkomafont{footsepline}{\color{footrule}}
\addtokomafont{pagehead}{\sffamily}
\addtokomafont{pagenumber}{\sffamily\bfseries\color{pagenumber}}

\automark[section]{chapter}

\clearpairofpagestyles
% Outer head: BUW logo (right on odd recto, left on even verso)
\rohead{\includegraphics[height=1.8em]{\buwlogopdf}}
\lehead{\includegraphics[height=1.8em]{\buwlogopdf}}
% Inner head: chapter + section. Tabular locks per-slot alignment.
% Negative hspace compensates babel's leading injection in \leftmark/\rightmark.
\lohead{\begin{tabular}[b]{@{}l@{}}\hspace*{-32pt}\textbf{\leftmark}\\\hspace*{-29pt}\rightmark\end{tabular}}
\rehead{\begin{tabular}[b]{@{}r@{}}\textbf{\leftmark}\\\rightmark\end{tabular}}
% Outer foot: page number, raised slightly to keep distance from the foot rule
\ofoot*{\rule{0pt}{1.6em}\pagemark}
\pagestyle{scrheadings}

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% Chapter / section title format — cascading colored numbers (KOMA-native)
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
\setkomafont{disposition}{\sffamily\bfseries}
\setkomafont{chapter}{\Huge}
\setkomafont{section}{\LARGE}
\setkomafont{subsection}{\Large}
\setkomafont{subsubsection}{\large}

\renewcommand*{\chapterformat}{\thechapter\autodot\enskip}

\renewcommand*{\sectionformat}{%
  \textcolor{textBlack!50}{\thechapter.}%
  \arabic{section}\autodot\enskip%
}

\renewcommand*{\subsectionformat}{%
  \textcolor{textBlack!33}{\thechapter.}%
  \textcolor{textBlack!50}{\arabic{section}.}%
  \arabic{subsection}\autodot\enskip%
}

\renewcommand*{\subsubsectionformat}{%
  \textcolor{textBlack!20}{\thechapter.}%
  \textcolor{textBlack!33}{\arabic{section}.}%
  \textcolor{textBlack!50}{\arabic{subsection}.}%
  \arabic{subsubsection}\autodot\enskip%
}

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% Hyperlinks (loaded last, except for cleveref-style add-ons)
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
\RequirePackage{nameref}
\usepackage[
  breaklinks,
  hyperindex,
  colorlinks=false,
  pdftex,
  bookmarks=true,
  bookmarksopen=true,
  bookmarksnumbered=true,
]{hyperref}

\ifbool{markLinks}{}{\hypersetup{hidelinks}}

%% Allow minted's \code|...| (and similar inline-verbatim macros) inside PDF metadata
\pdfstringdefDisableCommands{%
  \def\code|#1|{#1}%
  \def\js|#1|{#1}%
  \def\html|#1|{#1}%
  \def\json|#1|{#1}%
}

\hypersetup{
  pdftitle  = {\thesistitle},
  pdfauthor = {\authorname},
  pdfsubject= {\thesistype},
  pdfkeywords={\keywords},
  pdfcreator= {LaTeX},
  unicode   = true,
}

\addto\extrasenglish{
  \def\chapterautorefname{Chapter}
  \def\sectionautorefname{Section}
  \def\subsectionautorefname{Subsection}
  \def\subsubsectionautorefname{Subsubsection}
  \def\paragraphautorefname{Paragraph}
  \def\subparagraphautorefname{Subparagraph}
  \def\listingautorefname{Listing}
}
